post_merge_adjustments.C-001_wasmtime_bump_may_be_optional: PR #55 (merged first) kept wasmtime at v44 but enabled features = ["cranelift","component-model","cache","parallel-compilation","async"]. Component Model APIs Phase 5 needs are now available without the version bump. C-001 may shrink to a compile-time verification (`wasmtime::component::Component` etc. are in scope) or be skipped entirely. Defer the final call to C-001 execution time.
